steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage explicitly names the drawback: data from the Places API are restricted to customer-facing places. The correct answer must follow directly from that restriction.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "It may lead to conclusions that are not reflective of all the amenities in a given neighborhood.": a direct consequence of omitting non-customer-facing locations. ✓
  • "It is likely to contribute to inaccurate identifications of the boundaries of specific neighborhoods.": introduces a problem the passage never mentions. ✗
  • "It is based on recent advancements from other fields that have yet to be applied outside of those contexts.": introduces a problem the passage never mentions. ✗
  • "It depends upon data that are likely to be outdated.": introduces a problem the passage never mentions. ✗
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
